zh.Thorne, Ottery Saint Mary, East Devon di: 英國英格蘭戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利
zh.Moreton Corbet, Shropshire Unitary autho: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Roger Thorne於大約1376年出生在英國英格蘭戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利時，他的父親John Thorne38歲，母親Joanna Bamfield24歲。他於1401年與Millicent May在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他在英國史洛普爾被列為bailiff。他去世於1427年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Roger Thorne于大约1376年出生在英国英格兰戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利时，他的父亲John Thorne38岁，母亲Joanna Bamfield24岁。他于1401年与Millicent May在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他在英国史洛普爾被列为bailiff。他去世于1427年在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

variants.name: Thorn
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thurn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Katharina, Milbert.

German: topographic name for someone who lived near a watchtower, or a metonymic occupational name for someone responsible for manning one, from Middle High German turn, turm ‘tower’. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the many places called with this word in the Rhineland, Bavaria, Austria, and Bohemia.
English (Warwickshire): variant of   Thorne  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Roger Thorne was born about 1376, in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Thorne, was 38 and his mother, Joanna Bamfield, was 24. He married Millicent May in 1401, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. His occupation is listed as bailiff in Shropshire, England. He died in 1427, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.Thorne, Ottery Saint Mary, East Devon di: Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Roger Thorne est né environ 1376, à Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thorne, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joanna Bamfield, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Millicent May en 1401, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est bailiff à Shropshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1427, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Roger Thorne um 1376 in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thorne 38 und seine Mutter Joanna Bamfield 24. Er hat 1401 in Devon, England Millicent May geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. sein Beruf ist als bailiff in Shropshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1427 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Roger Thorneが約1376年にイギリスイギリスデボンサイント マリー オッテリーで生まれた時，父John Thorneは38歳，母Joanna Bamfieldは24歳であった。1401年にイギリスデボンでMillicent Mayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。イギリスシュロプシュアイアでの職業はbailiffと記録されている。彼は1427年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで52歳で死去した。

ko.Thorne, Ottery Saint Mary, East Devon di: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Roger Thorne(이)가 대략 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thorne(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Bamfield(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1401년 영국 데폰에서 Millicent May(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 슈럽실르에서 bailiff이었다. 그는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Roger Thorne nasceu aproximadamente 1376, em Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Thorne, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Bamfield, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Millicent May em 1401, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Sua profissão aparece como bailiff em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1427, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.Thorne, Ottery Saint Mary, East Devon di: сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Roger Thorne родился около 1376 г. в местности сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Thorne было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Bamfield, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Millicent May в 1401 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.  Он работал по профессии bailiff в местности шропшир, Англия. Он умер в 1427 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.
